1
Step 1: Introduction to DirectSend.

This is direct send app. It's simple and straight forward to use.

https://directsend.lovable.app/
2
Step 2: You want to create some folder and start uploading.

Click on the new folder button and create a new folder.

https://directsend.lovable.app/
3
Step 3: You can enter a folder just by clicking on it.

I just entered ilham's daily video folder

https://directsend.lovable.app/
4
Step 4: Upload video files just by dragging and dropping or clicking upload.

The video that I dragged from my hard drive to the folder is uploading.

https://directsend.lovable.app/
5
Step 5: It takes a few seconds to few minutes based on internet speed and file size.

Our video is uploaded.

https://directsend.lovable.app/
6
Step 6: Here are different options.

There is no download button, but you can zip, you can move, you can delete, and you can clear the full folder by using any of these options. In order to download the video, you have to right click on the video and then select download.

https://directsend.lovable.app/
